text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Takarazuka Kinen, and Satono
Diamond seems to be in good condition.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She was exhausted after the spring Tenno Sho, so
we adjusted her schedule to prioritize her
recovery.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But Satono Diamond notices something off about
Kitasan Black when they meet in the paddock.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black's intense aura from the Osaka Hai
and the spring Tenno Sho is nowhere to be found
today.
